tickets.description: Define shared TypeScript types for MenuCategory, MenuItem, Order, OrderStatus, and Settings used across frontend and backend.
constraints: Export all types from the file
tickets.worker_done_criteria: File exports MenuCategory, MenuItem, Order, OrderStatus, and Settings types/interfaces matching PRD data structures
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify types match PRD fields and are exported correctly

tickets.description: Setup SQLite database schema for categories, menu_items, orders, and settings tables with appropriate fields and constraints.
constraints: Include indexes on foreign keys and order status
tickets.worker_done_criteria: schema.sql defines tables for categories, menu_items, orders, and settings with correct columns and types
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify schema matches PRD data model and supports required queries

tickets.description: Implement FastAPI backend app skeleton with SQLite connection, CORS middleware, and static file serving for built frontend.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: main.py creates FastAPI app, connects to SQLite, serves static frontend, and enables CORS
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Run backend and verify GET / returns frontend index.html

tickets.description: Create React app entrypoint with Vite, Tailwind CSS setup, and basic App component rendering a placeholder.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: main.tsx renders App component with Tailwind CSS styles applied
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Run frontend dev server and see placeholder page with Tailwind styling

tickets.description: Implement WebSocket server setup in FastAPI backend to support real-time order status updates and admin notifications.
constraints: Manage connected clients with in-memory store
tickets.worker_done_criteria: ws.py exports websocket endpoint handling connections and broadcasting order status updates
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Connect with WebSocket client and verify messages can be sent and received

tickets.description: Create React WebSocket client hook to connect to backend WebSocket and provide real-time order status updates.
constraints: Auto-reconnect with exponential backoff on disconnect
tickets.worker_done_criteria: Hook connects to /ws, exposes order status updates, and handles reconnect logic
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify hook receives messages and reconnects after disconnect

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for menu categories CRUD: create, read (list), update, delete, and reorder.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: categories.py exports router with endpoints for all CRUD operations and reordering
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Test endpoints with curl or HTTP client for full CRUD and reorder functionality

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for menu items CRUD with photo upload support and availability toggle.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: menu_items.py exports router with CRUD endpoints including photo upload and availability toggle
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Test create, update with photo upload, toggle availability, and delete endpoints

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for orders: create order, list orders (admin), and update order status.
constraints: Broadcast order status updates via WebSocket on status change
tickets.worker_done_criteria: orders.py exports router with endpoints to create orders, list orders, and update status with WS broadcast
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Create order, update status, and verify WebSocket clients receive updates

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for settings: get and update cart name, operating hours, and admin PIN.
constraints: Store settings in SQLite settings table
tickets.worker_done_criteria: settings.py exports router with GET and PUT endpoints for settings
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify settings can be retrieved and updated via API

tickets.description: Implement React page component for customers to browse menu grouped by category with photos, descriptions, and prices.
tickets.interaction_spec: User opens app, sees menu categories, taps category to expand items, views item photo, description, price.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: MenuBrowse component fetches categories and menu items, displays grouped menu with photos and details
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify menu loads correctly with categories and items displayed as per PRD

tickets.description: Implement React cart component allowing customers to add menu items with quantity controls and view cart summary.
tickets.interaction_spec: User taps + on menu item to add to cart, adjusts quantity with + and -, sees updated total in cart.
constraints: Export Cart component for use in MenuBrowse page
tickets.worker_done_criteria: Cart component manages items with quantities, calculates total, and exposes submit order trigger
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Add/remove items, adjust quantities, verify cart total updates correctly
qa_cmd: interact with cart on MenuBrowse page

tickets.description: Implement React order submission form and confirmation page showing order number after successful submission.
tickets.interaction_spec: User reviews cart, taps submit, form sends order to backend, then shows confirmation with order number.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: OrderSubmit component submits order, handles response, and displays confirmation with order number
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Submit order and verify confirmation page with correct order number appears

tickets.description: Implement React order status tracking page using WebSocket to show real-time status updates (Preparing → Ready → Picked Up).
tickets.interaction_spec: User enters order number, page connects to WebSocket, displays current status and updates in real-time.
constraints: Show status with warm color accents
tickets.worker_done_criteria: OrderStatus component connects via WebSocket and updates UI on status changes
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify real-time status updates received and displayed correctly

tickets.description: Implement React admin login page with PIN input and validation against backend settings API.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin enters PIN, taps submit, PIN validated via API, on success redirect to admin panel, on failure show error.
constraints: Show error toast on invalid PIN
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminLogin component validates PIN and redirects or shows error accordingly
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Test login with correct and incorrect PINs

tickets.description: Implement React admin panel main page with navigation links to menu management, order management, and settings.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin logs in, sees admin panel with navigation links, taps links to go to respective pages.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminPanel component renders navigation and routes to subpages
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify navigation links and routing work correctly

tickets.description: Implement React admin menu management page to list, add, edit, delete, and reorder categories.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin views categories list, adds new, edits existing, deletes, and reorders categories with drag and drop.
constraints: Use fetch to call categories API
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminCategories component manages categories CRUD and reorder via API
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Test full categories CRUD and reorder functionality

tickets.description: Implement React admin menu items management page to list, add, edit, delete items with photo upload and availability toggle.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin views items list, adds new with photo upload, edits details, toggles availability, deletes items.
constraints: Use fetch for menu items API
Use file input for photo upload
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminMenuItems component supports full CRUD with photo upload and availability toggle
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Test add/edit/delete items including photo upload and toggle

tickets.description: Implement React admin orders management page showing incoming orders with timestamps and one-click status updates.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin sees live list of orders, clicks buttons to update status, list updates in real-time via WebSocket.
constraints: Use WebSocket hook for real-time updates
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminOrders component lists orders with live updates and allows status changes
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify real-time order updates and status change functionality

tickets.description: Implement React admin daily sales summary page showing total sales and order counts for current day.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin opens sales summary page, sees total sales amount and number of orders for the day.
constraints: Fetch sales summary data from backend API
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminSalesSummary component fetches and displays daily sales and order count
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify sales summary matches backend data

tickets.description: Implement React admin settings page to configure cart name, operating hours, and admin PIN with save functionality.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin edits cart name, operating hours, and PIN, taps save, settings update via API with success or error feedback.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminSettings component loads, edits, validates, and saves settings via API
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Test settings load and save with validation and feedback
